title: asperula cynanchica subsp. occidentalis
intro: Asperula cynanchica subsp. occidentalis, also known as Western Woodruff, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its perennial growth habit and white, fragrant flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Western Woodruff include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function, among others. Western Woodruff is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
